system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括 digest 计划与对应的 article 摘要/引用。你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "title_zh": "...",
  "dek_zh": "...",
  "body_markdown": "...",
  "source_article_ids": ["..."]
}

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["6b529823-92f1-413f-a223-70802c88def8", "70031671-de56-404e-8734-a56736295186"], "article_ids": ["53fc3b04-67db-4cd1-9829-82e818740b5c"], "editorial_angle": "高端健身俱乐部与手工香氛品牌的跨界联名，将奢华生活方式从社交场景延伸至健身场景，强化品牌的感官体验与社群粘性", "title_zh": "Equinox 携手 Le Labo，以 Basil 香氛重塑高端健身体验", "dek_zh": "全球顶级健身俱乐部 Equinox 宣布 Le Labo 成为其全球独家洗护合作伙伴，将于 3 月 19 日起在所有门店供应 Basil 系列用品，标志着精品健身空间向多维度生活方式平台的升级", "source_names": ["Coveteur"]}, "source_articles": [{"article_id": "53fc3b04-67db-4cd1-9829-82e818740b5c", "source_name": "Coveteur", "title_raw": "Equinox Stocking Le Labo Just Makes Sense", "summary_raw": "​The luxury gym is leveling up with the announcement that Le Labo is its new global amenities partner.", "body_markdown": "# Equinox Stocking Le Labo Just Makes Sense

​The luxury gym is leveling up with the announcement that Le Labo is its new global amenities partner.

## Equinox Stocking Le Labo Just Makes Sense

The luxury gym is leveling up with the announcement that Le Labo is its new global amenities partner.

What does luxury signaling look like in 2026? For some, it's going to Equinox for their daily workout; for others, it's a bottle of Le Labo Rose 31 hand wash, displayed on their sink like an art piece. And now, the ultimate luxury lifestyle-beauty crossover has happened: Equinox has announced that Le Labo is its official amenities partner, which means that the luxury gym will be solely stocking Le Labo products in its signature Basil scent across Equinox clubs worldwide.

“Everything that’s part of the Equinox experience is deeply considered and intentional,” says Parinda Muley, SVP, of Strategic Partnerships at Equinox. “Le Labo is no exception; they stand out for their authenticity, craftsmanship, and for being a true extension of our members’ lifestyle and experience.”

Previously, Equinox stocked Grown Alchemist products in its locker rooms; previous to that, it was NYC-founded skincare brand Kiehl's. Equinox members were in an uproar when the fancy gym switched from Kiehl's to Grown Alchemist back in 2024, complaining that the niche Australian apothecary brand smelled too herbal, and did not feel as luxurious as the previous Kiehl's products.

Le Labo, founded in 2006 and beloved among the well-discerning for culture-shifting scents like Santal 33 and Another 13, makes perfect sense for Equinox from a luxury standpoint—and suggests the brand is listening to its members.

So far online, the sentiment seems to be positive after the Le Labo news. "Huge win, good on them for listening to the members," says one Reddit member in the EquinoxGyms subreddit. "Gotta hand it to them, that's an impressive brand!" says another.

Equinox will rolling out the new Le Labo products in all locations starting March 19th.
"}]}
